segments.text: Definitely scary for a light character like Sora, and especially on Hollow Bastion.
This isn't going to be good.
Oh, looks for the up tilt, and it will be the down smash hold.

full_text: Definitely scary for a light character like Sora, and especially on Hollow Bastion. This isn't going to be good. Oh, looks for the up tilt, and it will be the down smash hold.
